message:
feat: Import optimized utils from metal0

Import performance-critical utilities from metal0 project:

- wyhash: Fast non-cryptographic hash (same as Bun) ~40-50% faster
- StringHashMap: ArrayHashMap with wyhash for better cache locality
- fast_allocator: c_allocator in release (2-5x faster), GPA in debug
- ScratchBuffer: Thread-local 64KB scratch space for temp allocations
- createArena: Helper for per-request arena allocators

These optimizations can be applied to:
- Tokenizer vocab lookups
- Model metadata maps
- Server request routing
- Per-request memory management
